result.reason: Users need a streamlined way to transfer their application settings to new computers, addressing a common usability gap.
result.approach: Implement a feature to export all user-configurable settings and UI layout information into a single, portable file (e.g., XML or JSON) and a corresponding function to import these settings, applying them to the application's configuration.
